Package net.okocraft.box.api

Interface BoxAPI

public interface BoxAPI
An API of Box.

    Method
    Description

    Gets an instance of BoxAPI.

    Checks if BoxAPI is available.

  • Method Details

    • api

      @NotNull static @NotNull BoxAPI api()
      Gets an instance of BoxAPI.
      Returns:
      an instance of BoxAPI
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if BoxAPI is not loaded

    • isLoaded

      static boolean isLoaded()
      Checks if BoxAPI is available.
      Returns:
      true if BoxAPI is loaded, otherwise false

    • getPluginInstance

      @NotNull @NotNull Plugin getPluginInstance()
      Gets the instance of Box.

      This is intended for operations that require a plugin instance.

      Returns:
      the plugin instance

    • getPluginDirectory

      @NotNull @NotNull Path getPluginDirectory()
      Gets the path of the plugin directory.
      Returns:
      the path of the plugin directory

    • getMessageProvider

      @NotNull @NotNull MessageProvider getMessageProvider()
      Gets the MessageProvider.
      Returns:
      the MessageProvider

    • getUserManager

      @NotNull @NotNull UserManager getUserManager()
      Gets the UserManager.
      Returns:
      the UserManager

    • getItemManager

      @NotNull @NotNull ItemManager getItemManager()
      Gets the ItemManager.
      Returns:
      the ItemManager

    • getStockManager

      @NotNull @NotNull StockManager getStockManager()
      Gets the StockManager.
      Returns:
      the StockManager

    • getBoxPlayerMap

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxPlayerMap getBoxPlayerMap()
      Gets the BoxPlayerMap.
      Returns:
      the BoxPlayerMap

    • getEventManager

      @NotNull @NotNull EventManager getEventManager()
      Gets the EventManager.
      Returns:
      the EventManager

    • getCustomDataManager

      @NotNull @NotNull CustomDataManager getCustomDataManager()
      Gets the CustomDataManager.
      Returns:
      the CustomDataManager

    • getScheduler

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxScheduler getScheduler()
      Gets the BoxScheduler.
      Returns:
      the BoxScheduler

    • getBoxCommand

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxCommand getBoxCommand()
      Gets the BoxCommand.
      Returns:
      the BoxCommand

    • getBoxAdminCommand

      @NotNull @NotNull BoxAdminCommand getBoxAdminCommand()
      Gets the BoxAdminCommand.
      Returns:
      the BoxAdminCommand

    • getFeatures

      @NotNull @NotNull @Unmodifiable List<BoxFeature> getFeatures()
      Gets registered BoxFeatures.
      Returns:
      registered BoxFeature

    • getFeature

      @NotNull <T extends BoxFeature> @NotNull Optional<T> getFeature(@NotNull @NotNull Class<T> clazz)
      Gets the registered BoxFeature instance.

      Note: This method returns the first BoxFeature instance with matching class from getFeatures().

      Type Parameters:
      T - the type of BoxFeature
      Parameters:
      clazz - the feature class
      Returns:
      if the BoxFeature is registered, returns its instance, otherwise Optional.empty()

    • reload

      void reload(@NotNull @NotNull CommandSender sender)
      Reloads box and registered BoxFeatures.

      This method reloads some settings of Box (such as language and disabled world) and the BoxFeature in which Reloadable is implemented.

      Parameters:
      sender - the sender who executed reload

    • canUseBox

      boolean canUseBox(@NotNull @NotNull Player player)
      Checks if the specified Player can use Box.
      Parameters:
      player - the Player to check
      Returns:
      true if the Player can use Box, otherwise false

    • isDisabledWorld

      boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull @NotNull World world)
      Checks if Box is not available in the specified world.
      Parameters:
      world - the world to check
      Returns:
      if Box is disabled in the specified world, returns true, otherwise false

    • isDisabledWorld

      boolean isDisabledWorld(@NotNull @NotNull String worldName)
      Checks if Box is not available in the specified world name.
      Parameters:
      worldName - the world name to check
      Returns:
      if Box is disabled in the specified world, returns true, otherwise false
